description_long: This coupe car features a compact, aerodynamic body with a low profile and a prominent rear wing, suggesting a design focused on speed and performance. The exterior is predominantly red with white and black racing stripes, and the car sits on four exposed wheels with visible suspension components. The front end is characterized by a pointed nose and a low, wide stance, while the rear includes a large spoiler and a boxy rear section. The cockpit area is enclosed with a small, clear windshield, and the side profile reveals a streamlined silhouette with minimal overhangs. The car's details, such as the racing livery and number decals, evoke the appearance of a high-performance race car. The materials appear to be a mix of metal, plastic, rubber, and glass, typical of lightweight racing vehicles.
description: A compact, red coupe car with racing stripes, a large rear wing, and a streamlined, aerodynamic body. The car features exposed wheels, a low stance, and detailed racing livery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, low stance, and racing stripes leading up to the windshield.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the aerodynamic profile, large rear wing, and visible wheel and suspension details.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured, with only the rear wing and part of the car's boxy back section faintly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, with the car almost entirely hidden behind the wall, only the top of the rear wing is slightly visible.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
